title: Man Stole Medieval Skull From Church and Sealed it in Concrete, Police Say
summary_full: The man disagreed with the 800-year-old relic’s display in a church in the Czech Republic and planned to throw it into a river, police said.
summary_public: The man disagreed with the 800-year-old relic’s display in a church in the Czech Republic and planned to throw it into a river, police said.
